title: Compressed Furnace
description: Gives you a vanilla like factory furnace and crusher.
body:
🏭 Compressed Furnace

Vanilla+ processing, industrial efficiency.

📖 About the Mod

This mod expands your processing power with a suite of tiered machines designed for Vanilla+ or modded playthroughs. Whether you need to smelt ores, blast raw metals, or crush resources, these factories allow you to process multiple items simultaneously in a single block.

⚙️ The Machines

All machines come in Fuel-Powered and Energy-Powered (FE) variants.

*   🔥 Furnace Factory: Smelt items faster and in bulk.
*   💨 Blast Furnace Factory: Specialized for ores and metals.
*   🔨 Crusher Factory: Grind items down into dusts or raw components.
*   ⚡ Generator: (Fuel only) Generates power with increased capacity and transfer speeds per tier.

📏 Tiers & Input Capacity

Why build a wall of furnaces when you can have one efficient factory?

*   Tier 1 (Compressed): 2 Input Slots
*   Tier 2 (Double): 4 Input Slots
*   Tier 3 (Triple): 6 Input Slots

✨ Key Features

🎮 Total Control (New!)

We have completely overhauled how you interact with the machines:

*   Side Configuration: Use the new UI buttons to color-code and toggle which sides handle Input, Output, and Fuel. No more guessing!
*   Auto-Export: Toggle the Auto-Export button to automatically push finished items to adjacent inventories or pipes. (Configurable transfer rates/delays).

🧠 Smart Processing (New!)

*   Input Locking: Inputs are now "linked" to their outputs. The machine prevents you (or your pipes) from inserting items that don't match the current recipe, preventing jams.
*   Smart Fuel: Fuel is distributed dynamically. Slots only consume fuel when they are actively cooking.
*   Auto-Split: Items are smartly split between input slots that produce the same output.

🔌 Configuration

*   In-Game Config: Use the NeoForge Client Config Editor to adjust cooking speeds, energy caps, and auto-export settings without restarting the game.

🆕 Recent Updates (v0.1.7 - v0.2.0)

*   Visuals: Added face animations to blocks when active and updated textures.
*   Bug Fixes: Fixed issues with powered machines losing data, input slot desyncs, and hopper interactions.
*   Energy: Generators now scale storage and transfer speeds correctly per tier.

🤝 Community & Support

Modpacks: ✅ YES! You can use this mod in your modpack.

Feedback: Found a bug?

*   💬 Discord: Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Rcwdr7e) and leave a message in the mod's text channel.
